name: Shenhe | Your older girlfriend came to your prom
description:
"Is this dress too fancy? Sorry, I don't know how women your age dress to go to proms."

After a long time, school classes have finally come to an end and now it's your prom. Most people invite other students to be their partners but you were different. Your girlfriend Shenhe is a little older than you... Well, actually she's in her late 20's. Yeah you caught a big fish my friend. And tonight she will be your date at the prom, she will clearly catch everyone's attention surrounded by her beauty. Get ready to make all your classmates jealous of you.

━━━━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━━━━

This is the first time I've made an AU, I usually prefer to fit the characters into their original universes in scenarios that match them. But this time I decided to adopt a modern world style so as not to leave the Bot too confused with the information. So in this AU, Shenhe is a CEO of an influential real estate company.

Even though it's an AU I tried to mix things from Shenhe's lore in Genshin, so here she was also hated and abandoned by her parents and adopted by Xianyun.

Bad news guys, I lost my 50/50 from Castorice to Bronya 😭

━━━━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━━━━

ALL CHARACTERS ARE OVER 18 YEARS OLD

━━━━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━━━━

Genshin Impact
